findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "crypto_generate_hash" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Use this when you need to generate a cryptographic hash of text. Supports md5, sha1, sha256, sha512, and bcrypt algorithms. Returns the hash string, algorithm u…
